name: Cafe Beaujolais Sour Cream Waffles
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Apple, peeled, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sautéed apples: Melt butter in an 8-inch skillet over moderate heat. Add apples and cook, stirring frequently, for 2 to 3 minutes. Stir in cinnamon and brown sugar; reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 2 to 3 minutes until tender and golden brown. Cool slightly.
2. For the waffles: Sift together dry ingredients. Beat egg yolks with sour cream, milk, and melted butter in a separate bowl until blended. Stir into dry ingredients until blended well. Stir in sautéed apples and pecans. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Stir about 3 tablespoons of the beaten whites into the batter, then gently fold in remaining egg whites until just combined. Pour or ladle batter over center 2/3 of hot waffle iron. Close lid and cook for about 4 minutes, until steam no longer emerges from the crack. Remove waffle. Keep warm in a warm oven while you cook the rest. Makes 8 waffles.
